normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 2.2 - Outdoor Advertisements and Signage
scope_summary: Sets deemed-to-comply standards and exemptions from development approval for outdoor advertising signage across the whole City of Melville scheme area under Local Planning Scheme No. 6, including reserves, thoroughfares and private property. Covers signage in the Residential zone (home occupation, display home, commercial-in-residential, real estate, construction signs), signage in non-residential zones (ground based, pylon, monolith, window, projecting, awning, wall signs), temporary signage and directional signs, with performance-based assessment criteria where standards are not met. Signs within 1.5m of a crossover/street truncation or on heritage listed places are never exempt.
